body:
This PR:

 - Adds the use of LazyBroadcast.jl to the ClimaCore test suite
 - Refactors [test/MatrixFields/matrix_fields_broadcasting/test_scalar_1.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1873/files#diff-e8c45e2f36b528c6915f067e14926c439bcdb814cacc17d9366fcca69ad9f557) by splitting apart the unit and optimization tests.

The advantages of the refactoring done in this PR are:
 - The broadcasted object can later be reused to test (or benchmark) `getidx` (https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/1871)
 - Code duplication is reduced between `get_result` (e.g., `() -> (@. ᶜᶜmat ⋅ ᶜvec)`) and `set_result!` (e.g., `result -> (@. result = ᶜᶜmat ⋅ ᶜvec)`) by simply defining a generic `set_result!` (`set_result!(result, bc) = (materialize!(result, bc); nothing)`), made possible by using the broadcasted object.
 - The unit tests are very fast, and can be included in the unit tests, so that we can improve our reported unit test coverage.
title: Add LazyBroadcast to test env, refactor MatrixField BC tests

body:
This PR refactors the field matrix tests:
 - The utilities are generalized for some of the more complex cases
 - This PR refactors case 2 and 16, and adds them to the unit test list
title: Refactor matrix field tests, test_scalar 2 and 16

body: This PR is a followup to #1875.
title: Refactor more matrix field broadcasting tests
